visual: Drops into a very low side stance with one leg fully extended flat along the floor and hand sweeping along the inside of that leg — the creeping portion isolated from the rooster.
motion_description: The motion begins with the body lowering into a deep squat on the right leg as the left leg extends straight outward into a wide side stance. The right arm reaches backward and slightly upward with the hand forming a hook, while the left hand descends in a continuous, flowing sweep along the inside of the extended left leg. The torso then turns towards the extended leg as the weight shifts steadily forward, transitioning into a forward stance with the left palm rising to press extending outward.
